race.description: Mcphersons Parts & Service / Parkes Taxis Mdn Hcp
race.comment: ELASAND (8) took over a fair way from home then found a couple better last Sunday over 920m at Moruya. Draws the fence and should be in contention for a long way. KINGDOM HEART (7) continued her run of decent form last time out when she led for the judge but was swamped and missed the placings at the end of 1100m at Dubbo. Placed at both runs over this distance. Key runner from a favourable gate. HEAPS OF NOTICE (4) is a rising seven-year-old mare on debut which is rare. Won a recent Dubbo trial so she is obviously going okay. Keep her safe. ABATED BREATH (3) resumes. Was rarely far away in the maiden campaign. Each-way prospects.
